content.text: {"message":"Deploy instructions ready.","tool_purpose":"Return the current deployment constraints, hard rules and checklists the model should follow before generating files or calling deploy_app.","process_rules":["MANDATORY: You MUST use an app template. Call 'get_app_template' with -","1. chosen 'app_type' ('frontend-only' | 'frontend+backend'),","2. 'frontend_template' ('html-static' | 'react-vite' | 'nextjs-static').","Treat the description below as a formal spec. Before writing any files or calling deploy_app:","Write a concise implementation checklist.","Write a concise preflight checklist derived from the hard rules and schema.","Do not call deploy_app until every preflight item passes.","MANDATORY PROGRESS REPORTING: after get_app_template and before deploy_app, call 'update_coding_progress' on each significant milestone and provide a short descriptive 'step' label."],"goal":"Goal: one deploy_app call. If validation fails, fix all returned errors in one pass and retry (avoid iterative one-error retries).","sdk_architecture_rules":["Choose app_type: use 'frontend-only' unless custom backend logic is required.","If you need custom backend logic (custom HTTP endpoints, server-side secrets, third-party API calls), use 'frontend+backend' and implement exactly one backend entrypoint: backend/index.ts (standard Lambda handler).","If the app needs any AI behavior (generation, classification, extraction, scraping, agent loops), you MUST choose 'frontend+backend'.","Treat AI as needed even when not explicitly requested if the task implies it (e.g., classify images, OCR text from document photos, read values from photos, summarize long text, extract structured fields from unstructured input).","All model calls must run in backend/index.ts via @appdeploy/sdk ai.* APIs (ai.generate / ai.classify / ai.extract / ai.ocr / ai.scrape / ai.run).","Do NOT call Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini directly from frontend code. Artifact-only API patterns are not available in deployed AppDeploy apps.","Backend code: use @appdeploy/sdk for persistence (db + storage), realtime messaging (ws), authentication (auth), notifications (notifications), and AI operations (ai).","IMPORTANT: Backend code must never import or use @appdeploy/client.","IMPORTANT: Frontend code must never import or use @appdeploy/sdk.","IMPORTANT: Never cast SDK objects to any (e.g., 'storage as any', 'db as any', 'ai as any', 'ws as any'); use the provided SDK types as-is.","The 'get_app_template' tool returns SDK types and examples for 'frontend+backend' apps. Implement using only the returned API surface (do not guess).","Authentication: Use { auth } from @appdeploy/client for frontend sign-in, { auth } from @appdeploy/sdk for backend token validation. See auth_usage section.","Notifications: Use { notifications } from @appdeploy/client in frontend and { notifications } from @appdeploy/sdk in backend. See notifications_usage section.","STYLING: All templates include Tailwind CSS. Prefer Tailwind utilities (className=\"flex gap-4 p-2 bg-blue-500\") over custom CSS. Write custom CSS only when Tailwind doesn't cover the use case.","ICONS: All templates include Lucide icons. Import icons from 'lucide-react' (React) or 'lucide' (vanilla). NEVER generate inline SVG icon code."],"calling_backend":["Use 'api' from @appdeploy/client for calls to the AppDeploy backend. Treat 'api' as an axios-like instance.","Import 'api' via a bare module specifier: import { api } from '@appdeploy/client'; never use URL/CDN imports (e.g., https://esm.sh/...).","IMPORTANT: Frontend must not call the AppDeploy backend with fetch() or axios directly.","IMPORTANT: This restriction applies only to calls to the AppDeploy backend. Using fetch/axios for third-party APIs is allowed when needed, except direct LLM-provider calls from frontend.","IMPORTANT: Frontend must never call Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini endpoints directly. Put AI calls in backend and use @appdeploy/sdk ai.* there.","IMPORTANT: Frontend code must exclusively call the backend using the 'api' utility from @appdeploy/client. E.g., api.get('/api/...').","Authentication: After auth.signIn(), the 'api' object automatically attaches Bearer tokens to all requests. No manual Authorization header needed."],"partial_updates":["For updates (app_id provided): ","  (1) use diffs[] for incremental changes ","  (2) use content for anything else. ","Each file sent with content is a full replacement; diffs[] apply surgical changes to the base snapshot.","Never resend unchanged files - the backend merges your changes with the existing snapshot."],"template_based_deployment":["NEW APPS: 'frontend_template' MUST be provided; backend auto-includes all template files as the base.","Only send: ","  (1) files that don't exist in the template (e.g., src/components/MyWidget.tsx), ","  (2) diffs to modify template files (e.g., add dependencies to package.json, customize src/App.tsx).","Do NOT send template files verbatim - they are auto-included."],"file_diffs":["diffs[] apply to a base: existing snapshot (when 'app_id' provided) or template (when 'frontend_template' provided for new apps).","NEW APPS ('app_id' not provided): use diffs[] to modify template files; use content for new files.","UPDATES ('app_id' provided): use diffs[] for incremental changes; use content for anything else.","Each diff: { from: non-empty string (exact match), to: string, multiple?: boolean }.","Default multiple=false: fails if 'from' matches more than once; set multiple=true to replace all occurrences.","Diffs apply sequentially; request fails if 'from' not found."],"remote_filesystem":["AppDeploy maintains a remote source snapshot for each app - this is what actually runs in production.","Every deploy_app updates this snapshot: merge with template base (new app), or merge with existing snapshot (update).","The remote snapshot is the source of truth, essentially like a git repo. Your local files or context may drift after multiple edits.","If uncertain about current state, query it: src_glob (list files), src_grep (search), src_read (read content). All require app_id.","Use get_app_versions to list versions; apply_app_version to roll back."],"required_files":{"new_apps":["files[] MUST contain ONLY: (1) new files not in template (use content), (2) diffs to modify template files.","Do NOT include unmodified template files - they are auto-included."],"updates":["files[] MUST contain ONLY changed files. Use diffs[] for incremental changes; use content for anything else."]},"implementation_checklist":["0. NEW APPS: Write 3-10 tests in tests/tests.txt (TDD). Mark one [sanity]. See format in get_app_template.","0a. TEST DESIGN FOR SPEED + COVERAGE: Order tests by value and runtime. Put fastest high-signal checks first, then deeper CRUD/workflow checks, then slower edge/responsive checks last.","0b. TEST COVERAGE PLAN: Ensure suite-level coverage includes load/access, core success flow, state mutation, and at least one failure/guardrail scenario.","0c. UPDATES: Review tests/tests.txt. If your changes affect user-visible behavior, UI elements, or test expectations, update tests using diffs[] to match the new behavior.","1. app_type decision ('frontend-only' or 'frontend+backend')","2. choose and read an app template","2b. During coding/validation, call update_coding_progress on each significant milestone with a descriptive step label.","3. frontend project files including UI","4. backend plan using @appdeploy/sdk (db/storage/ws/auth/ai/notifications) if needed","4a. If AI is requested or needed by the task, add backend API routes that call @appdeploy/sdk ai.* and have frontend call those routes via api.*.","5. Treat @appdeploy/sdk and @appdeploy/client as pre-installed internal packages. The frontend must exclusively use the api utility from @appdeploy/client for all backend communication.","Generate files[] strictly from this checklist. If a required file is not listed, add it to the checklist before generating files[]."],"hard_rules":["MUST use an app template: call 'get_app_template' with your 'app_type' and 'frontend_template' before writing any code.","MANDATORY: After get_app_template and until deploy_app is called, invoke update_coding_progress for each significant milestone and include a descriptive step label.","Always include 'app_id', 'app_name', and 'app_type'.","app_id must be null or a valid id. Never send the string 'undefined'.","NEW APPS ('app_id' is null): Include 'frontend_template'.","NEW APPS ('app_id' is null): include 'description'.","NEW APPS ('app_id' is null): files[] MUST contain only new files + diffs to template files. Do NOT include unmodified template files.","NEW APPS: Include tests/tests.txt with 3-10 tests (use content). UPDATES: Use diffs[] to modify tests/tests.txt if your changes affect test expectations.","TESTS: Prefer 3-6 steps per test. Steps should build a comprehensive scenario.","TESTS: Exactly one [sanity] test, and it should be the fastest critical user-journey smoke test that validates app load plus one core interaction.","TESTS: Prefer deterministic assertions on visible UI outcomes; avoid brittle wording or assertions that depend on timing/order not guaranteed by product behavior.","UPDATES: When changing user-visible behavior (UI text, layout, features, workflows), update tests/tests.txt to reflect the new behavior using diffs[]. Tests must stay synchronized with the app.","UPDATES ('app_id' is not null): files[] MUST contain only changed files. Never resend unchanged files.","Each 'files[]' entry must include exactly one file path field: filename (or path/file/name). Do not include duplicates.","Each 'files[]' entry must include either content or diffs, not both.","'deletePaths' is only allowed when 'app_id' is provided; use explicit file paths and do not overlap any files[].","'package.json' must include 'scripts.build' and any required dependencies.","Every bare backend import that is not runtime-provided must be declared in package.json dependencies/devDependencies. Runtime-provided backend imports include node built-ins, @appdeploy/sdk, and @aws-sdk/*.","Backend third-party imports must match the package export style (named or namespace). Do not assume a default export exists.","Do not add @appdeploy/sdk or @appdeploy/client to package.json dependencies or devDependencies (they are provided by the platform).","Do not import @appdeploy/client or @appdeploy/sdk via URL/CDN (e.g., esm.sh, unpkg, skypack). Use bare module imports; the platform injects these packages.","Notifications frontend: do not import Firebase SDK directly (firebase/*); use @appdeploy/client notifications APIs only.","Notifications backend: do not import/use firebase or call FCM HTTP endpoints directly; use @appdeploy/sdk notifications APIs only.","Notifications: do not read, return, persist, or query raw FCM tokens in the app code (frontend, backend, DB, logs).","Frontend code must never import @appdeploy/sdk.","Backend code must never import @appdeploy/client.","SPAs (React Router, etc.): do not use absolute client routes (leading '/'). Use HashRouter.","MANDATORY: Replace 'APP_TITLE' placeholder in index.html <title> tag with the actual app_name value.","frontend+backend: extend backend/index.ts template. Add routes to the router() call using diffs. `router`, `json`, `error`, `requireAuth`, `withScopes`, and `requireAdminEmailAllowlist` are all importable from `@appdeploy/sdk`.","frontend+backend: frontend must call the AppDeploy backend only using api.<method>(...) from @appdeploy/client (no fetch('/api/...') or axios('/api/...') to the AppDeploy backend).","frontend+backend: client calls to the backend, such as fetch('/api'), axios('/api') are not allowed. only use `api.<method>` from @appdeploy/client.","If AI is requested or needed, app_type MUST be 'frontend+backend' and backend routes MUST call @appdeploy/sdk ai.*.","If AI is requested or needed, frontend must not call LLM providers directly (Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini).","When creating new files with exports, add corresponding import statements in files that use them.","Authentication: If using auth, import { auth } from @appdeploy/client in frontend and { auth } from @appdeploy/sdk in backend.","Authentication: Backend routes MUST use middlewares' arrays in router() values.","Authentication: Protected endpoints MUST use '[requireAuth(), ...]', then access identity via 'ctx.user!'.","Authentication: If app has admin functionality, explicitly ask for allowed admin email(s) and define ADMIN_EMAILS in backend/index.ts with given addresses."],"preflight_checklist":["NEW APPS: Confirm tests/tests.txt contains 3-10 stateless tests with exactly one [sanity] test.","UPDATES: If changes affect user-visible behavior (UI, features, workflows), confirm tests/tests.txt was updated via diffs[] to match new behavior.","Confirm 'get_app_template' was called with 'app_type' and 'frontend_template'.","Confirm update_coding_progress was called for significant milestones before deploy_app and each call included a descriptive step label.","Confirm 'app_type' matches 'frontend-only' or 'frontend+backend'.","Confirm frontend uses one of the allowed app templates ('html-static', 'react-vite', 'nextjs-static').","Confirm new app: if 'app_id' is null, include 'frontend_template' param and 'description'.","Confirm new app with template: only send new files + diffs to template files (not full template files verbatim).","Confirm all template placeholders (e.g., 'APP_TITLE') are replaced with actual values (e.g., app_name) in customized template files.","Confirm each 'files[]' entry includes either 'content' or 'diffs' (not both).","If 'deletePaths' is used, confirm paths exist in the current snapshot and do not overlap files[].","Confirm every bare backend import that is not runtime-provided is listed in package.json dependencies/devDependencies (runtime-provided: node built-ins, @appdeploy/sdk, @aws-sdk/*).","Confirm backend third-party imports use the package's actual export style (not assumed default imports).","Confirm frontend code does not import @appdeploy/sdk.","Confirm backend code does not import @appdeploy/client.","Confirm @appdeploy/client and @appdeploy/sdk are imported via bare module specifiers (no URL/CDN imports).","If notifications are used: confirm frontend uses @appdeploy/client notifications APIs and initial permission request is user-gesture-based.","If notifications are used: confirm backend uses @appdeploy/sdk notifications APIs","Confirm all asset paths are relative and framework config is set (Vite base / Next export config).","If SPA routing is used, confirm there are no absolute client routes (leading '/') and use HashRouter.","If frontend+backend: confirm backend template is extended via diffs (e.g., add routes to router() in backend/index.ts).","If frontend+backend: replace frontend direct calls to the backend via fetch('/api') and axios('/api') with 'api.<method>' from @appdeploy/client.","If AI is requested or needed: confirm app_type is frontend+backend and backend routes use @appdeploy/sdk ai.*.","If AI is requested or needed: confirm frontend has no direct Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini API calls.","Confirm styling uses Tailwind utilities where possible; custom CSS only for edge cases not covered by Tailwind.","Confirm icons use Lucide imports (lucide-react or lucide), not inline SVGs.","Confirm all used functions, components, and types have corresponding import statements.","If existing code violates these rules, fix violations before calling 'deploy_app'.","If using auth: confirm frontend imports { auth } from @appdeploy/client, backend imports { auth } from @appdeploy/sdk.","If using auth: confirm protected backend routes use [requireAuth(), ...].","If using auth and app has admin functionality: confirm admin emails were explicitly elicited and backend/index.ts defines ADMIN_EMAILS with given addresses."],"package_json_rules":["Include 'scripts.build' and required 'dependencies'.","Output raw JSON only (no markdown/code fences).","Content must be a JSON object."],"custom_api_usage":["use 'api' from @appdeploy/client like a standard axios instance.","never use fetch or axios directly for calling the backend."],"backend_persistence":["Use @appdeploy/sdk for database, file storage, realtime updates, AI calls, and anything that should survive browser refreshes or multi-devices.","The 'get_app_template' tool returns SDK types and examples; do not invent methods or types."],"cron_jobs":["Apps can define scheduled tasks (cron jobs) via a cron.json file in the project root.","Format and example provided by get_app_template (frontend+backend only)."],"auth_usage":["AppDeploy provides user authentication via auth.* functions.","Auth is opt-in: only use if the app requires user accounts or personalization.","The 'get_app_template' tool returns SDK types and examples for both frontend and backend; do not invent methods or types.","Frontend: use { auth } from @appdeploy/client to authenticate users and manage sign-in related functionality","Frontend: scopes control identity claims only. Allowed: 'openid', 'email', 'profile', 'offline_access'. Default: 'openid email profile'. Add 'offline_access' for long-lived refresh tokens. Unknown scopes are ignored.","Frontend: for app-specific roles/permissions, store them in your own db table (e.g., db.get('members', [user.userId])) ÔÇö do not use scopes for authorization.","Frontend: after auth.signIn(), the 'api' object from @appdeploy/client automatically attaches 'Authorization: Bearer <jwt>' to all requests.","Frontend: no manual token handling needed for standard api.get/post/put/delete calls.","Frontend: check auth.isSignedIn() before showing protected UI.","Frontend: handle auth.signIn() rejection ÔÇö error.code is 'popup_blocked' (show allow-popups message), 'popup_closed' (user cancelled), or 'auth_error' (authentication failed).","Backend: Use requireAuth() middleware for protected endpoints; it validates the token and sets ctx.user.","Backend: Use withScopes(...) for scope checks (delegates to auth.hasScope). For app-specific authorization (roles, membership), use your own db table.","Backend: Use requireAdminEmailAllowlist(ADMIN_EMAILS) for restricted-user functionality; ADMIN_EMAILS must contain the explicit, real, user-given, admin emails.","Backend: scope data access with ctx.user!.userId to prevent cross-user data leaks. E.g., db.list('notes', { filter: { userId: ctx.user!.userId } }) ÔÇö never return unscoped db.list() results from protected endpoints.","Backend: when creating records for an authenticated user, always store userId: ctx.user!.userId so the record can be filtered later."],"notifications_usage":["Use { notifications } from @appdeploy/client in frontend and notifications APIs from @appdeploy/sdk in backend.","Call notifications.subscribe() only from explicit user action (for example, Subscribe button) when permission is 'default'; never call it from page-load/effect hooks.","If custom prompt UI is needed, use notifications.getEnableGuidance() and call notifications.subscribe({ showUi: false }) from an explicit user gesture handler.","Silent re-registration on load is SDK-managed when permission is 'granted' and user is authenticated; app code should not call notifications.subscribe() from page-load effects.","Use notifications.onMessage(...) for app-specific foreground updates; optionally disable default foreground popup via notifications.configure({ showSystemNotificationOnForeground: false }).","Scheduling is app-owned (backend/cron); platform has no schedule/cancel API. Cron minimum interval is 5 minutes."],"ui_guidance":["Follow the user's description precisely.","Create a mobile-friendly, responsive (using Tailwind's responsive prefixes: sm:, md:, lg:), polished interface with clean design and proper spacing utilities.","Hide technical details (IDs, debug info, backend URLs) from end users.","Separate admin/settings UI from main user interface (use dedicated pages/modals).","Unless user specifies otherwise, assume non-technical end users.","Design a distinctive, intentional UI. Use a clean, solid visual style with a restrained, cohesive color palette; avoid neon/psychedelic colors, dominant pink/purple schemes, or highÔÇæsaturation gradients unless the user has clearly signaled that preference.","Use Tailwind CSS utilities for all styling; write custom CSS only when Tailwind lacks the capability.","Icons: use Lucide icons (import { IconName } from 'lucide-react'); never inline SVG code.","Typography: choose a distinctive font pairing; avoid Inter/Roboto/Arial/system fonts.","Color/theme: use Tailwind's color palette or extend with custom colors; commit to a cohesive palette; ensure contrast; avoid purple-on-white defaults.","Backgrounds: use Tailwind gradient/bg utilities for depth (gradients, patterns, layered shapes); avoid flat single-color pages.","Motion: use Tailwind's transition/animate utilities for purposeful animations (load/hover); avoid heavy JS.","Layout: use Tailwind's flex/grid utilities; avoid predictable grid-only layouts; include a signature visual element.","Stable grids: for boards/tiles where cells fill dynamically, use explicit row/column sizes and aspect-square on cells ÔÇö never rely on auto-sized tracks that shift as content appears.","Exception: if extending an existing app/design system, preserve its visual language."],"mobile_game_guidance":["Apply these rules only when the user requests a mobile-first game experience:","Gameplay must fit entirely within the viewport (no scrolling during play). Use Tailwind's h-screen, overflow-hidden to prevent X/Y overflow.","Prioritize gameplay on mobile: omit non-essential copy or move it behind an optional hint/overlay so it doesn't force scrolling.","Touch-first input: design tap/swipe controls; use touch* or pointer* events for reliable mobile interaction."],"status_behavior":["deploy_app is non-blocking; deployments typically complete within a few seconds.","'deploying' is a success in-progress state, not an error. Do not redeploy to unstick.","After deploy_app returns, always call get_app_status until status is 'ready', 'failed', or 'deleted'.","Always read response.message and validation feedback on every status check.","If get_app_status includes deployment.url while status is 'deploying', surface that exact URL to the user immediately.","If still deploying or deleting, wait at least 5 seconds before checking again.","Backend console.error() and console.warn() calls are automatically captured and surfaced in get_app_status backend error logs. Use them for debugging."],"post_deploy_workflow":{"poll":{"tool":"get_app_status","interval_seconds":5,"until_status":["ready","failed","deleted"]},"always_review":["Always read response.message and validation errors/warnings.","If get_app_status returns an error summary, treat it as authoritative.","If deployment.url is present at any status (including 'deploying'), immediately show `Live URL: <url>` to the user before continuing to poll."],"on_ready":["If validation errors/warnings exist, show them to the user and fix automatically.","Return the public URL to the user."],"on_failed":["Show the failure summary to the user.","Review the errors field and files_to_fix in the response.","Prioritize fixing files listed in files_to_fix; for unlisted errors, fix the relevant file.","Prefer diffs[] for surgical fixes (works for both new template-based apps and updates). Use content for new files not in template.","Fix issues automatically and redeploy."],"on_deleted":["Confirm deletion to the user."]},"routing":{"spa":{"forbid_absolute_routes":true,"allowed_strategies":["relative routes","HashRouter"]}},"imports":{"forbid_frontend":["@appdeploy/sdk"],"forbid_backend":["@appdeploy/client"]},"backend_entrypoint_path":"backend/index.ts","frontend_backend_calling_rule":"Frontend must call the AppDeploy backend only using api.<method>(...) from @appdeploy/client (no fetch('/api/...') or axios('/api/...') to the AppDeploy backend)."}
